message:
revert: remove auto-push to git remote (broken)

Git remotes are completely broken. The auto-push feature (4fd1f6e) was
pushing to the remote after every mutating command with no off switch,
hitting broken git remote paths on every bd operation.

Removes dolt_autopush.go and all references (commandDidExplicitPush,
maybeAutoPush calls in PersistentPostRun and shutdown flush).

Explicit 'bd dolt push' still works for manual use.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
